positive: Minimalist line art of a celestial forest grove, depicting stylized trees with glowing, bioluminescent leaves that hang like crystalline lanterns. Central subject is a gentle, stylized lunar crescent hovering over a meandering river, reflecting the glow onto floating lily pads. The style is clean, continuous line work mixed with deep engraved etching aesthetics. Composition must be circular and perfectly symmetrical for print repeat. Use a limited, cool color palette dominated by midnight blue, silver, and luminous teal, with high contrast black lines. Focus on strong negative space and clean, graphic silhouettes suitable for screen printing on clothing. Highly detailed, vector quality.
negative: blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifact, low detail, bad anatomy, ugly, out of frame, noisy, grainy, cropped, jpeg artifacts
